validation_queries.error_message: Found none of the amd-smi categories
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE target_arch is 'GPU'

required_tables._comment: The actual number of samples will vary depending on the GPU. This validates presence of samples, not the actual number of samples.

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi monitoring busy times
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi-busy samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_busy_mm'

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi monitoring GPU temperature

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_temp'
